atten4.ptxt: If the following conditions are detected while the cruise control is in operation, the system clears the stored vehicle speed in the ECM and cancels the cruise control operation.

item.ptxt: There is open or short in stop light switch circuit
There is problem with vehicle speed signal
There is problem with throttle position sensor and motor

entry.ptxt: Turn cruise control main switch on again

item.ptxt: There is problem with input circuit of stop light switch circuit
There is problem with cancel circuit
Turn cruise control main switch on again
Turn ignition switch off then on again

entry.ptxt: CRUISE main indicator light remains on (Cruise control is canceled)

item.ptxt: Vehicle speed is lower than low speed limit (approx. 40 km/h (25 mph)) while running with cruise control on

entry.ptxt: Push cruise control main switch to + (ACCEL)/RES (RESUME)

item.ptxt: Vehicle speed is lower than stored speed by approx. 16 km/h (10 mph) or more

entry.ptxt: Push cruise control main switch to - (COAST)/SET
